title: Spicy Velvety Mexican Cheese Stir-fry
description: This spicy and velvety Mexican cheese stir-fry is a gluten-free-friendly meal-prep option that combines the richness of liquid cheese with bold spices for an indulgent yet satisfying dish.

ingredients.name: Coconut milk or almond milk (dairy free option)
Spices (optional): cumin, chili powder, smoked paprika

instructions: Mix the mashed avocado, cilantro, lemon juice, and spices together in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Spread the tortilla chips on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly toasted and golden brown.
In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté diced bell peppers, onions, garlic, and jalepeno (or serrano) pepper until softened, about 5-7 minutes.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a simmer. Slowly stir in the gluten-free all-purpose flour or cornstarch mixture until thickened.
Stir in the avocado-cilantro mixture into the skillet with the vegetables. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Serve hot over the toasted tortilla chips and garnish with extra cilantro if desired.
